name: James Hardie Industries Plc
analysis: JHX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$32.7500. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$35.3100, stop A$30.5613, target A$49.5561 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
